blockingIssues.description: The added calendar-mode `self.hide(cx)` calls do not dismiss the launcher because `LauncherWindow::hide()` special-cases `SearchMode::Calendar` and exits calendar mode instead of hiding the window (`crates/photoncast/src/launcher/mod.rs:857-860`). Calendar `Copy Title`, `Copy Details`, and `Open in Calendar` therefore still leave the launcher visible in normal mode after the action runs.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that `LauncherWindow::hide()` is mode-sensitive and only exits calendar mode instead of dismissing the window when `SearchMode::Calendar` is active.

Documented that active quick-select coverage is mostly limited to index/bounds checks and that the end-to-end GPUI quick-select test is ignored, so binding regressions can evade active automated coverage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` must be `false` whenever required steps are skipped, and document how workers should report mission-approved validation deviations such as using `cargo test --workspace --lib -- --test-threads=6` instead of the skill's full-workspace command.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviewed ux-fixes features reported `followedProcedure: true` despite recorded deviations from required skill steps. The quick-select fix skipped the skill's full-file read, TDD red phase, and full-workspace test command while relying on the mission's `--lib` validation guidance; the launcher-dismiss fix also skipped the red phase yet still reported `followedProcedure: true`.

rejectedObservations.observation: A second reviewer independently noted the same `rust-fix-worker` procedure/adherence mismatch.
